topic: ChatGPT Plus — $20/month who actually needs it
hook: Twenty bucks for ChatGPT Plus — and most casual users shouldn't pay.
strength_hint: GPT-4o, plugins, voice, and memory for daily power users.
weakness_hint: $20 adds little if you only chat occasionally — free tier covers basics.
verdict_hint: Skip unless you hit limits daily

topic: Claude Code — terminal agent honest breakdown
hook: Claude Code sounds amazing — but most people should not pay for this.
strength_hint: Terminal agent edits multi-file repos, runs tests, git ops.
weakness_hint: Bundled with Claude Pro; heavy use burns limits; weak if you don't code.
verdict_hint: Pay if you code in terminal daily; Skip otherwise

topic: Claude Pro vs ChatGPT Plus — one axis each wins
hook: Twenty bucks for Claude — but ChatGPT already covers most writers.
strength_hint: Cleaner long-form writing and document analysis.
weakness_hint: Same $20 as ChatGPT — no clear win for casual chatters.
verdict_hint: Pay for writers; Skip for casual chat

hook: Google wants twenty for Gemini Advanced — free Gemini might be enough.
strength_hint: Deep Google Workspace integration and 2TB storage bundle.
weakness_hint: Free Gemini 2.x covers most research and chat for normal users.
verdict_hint: Wait if free Gemini is enough

topic: InVideo AI for daily Shorts — credit math honest check
hook: InVideo can ship a Short in minutes — but the credit math catches people.
strength_hint: Script-to-Shorts speed with stock, captions, and Ms. Byte-style hosts.
weakness_hint: Credits burn fast; horizontal stock crops look broken in 9:16.
verdict_hint: Pay if you ship daily Shorts

topic: Cursor Pro — who actually needs the AI editor
hook: Cursor Pro looks perfect — unless you don't write code daily.
strength_hint: Inline AI edits across your whole codebase in the editor.
weakness_hint: $20/mo wasted if you don't live in an IDE.
verdict_hint: Skip unless you code every day

topic: Perplexity Pro vs free search — research job test
hook: Ten bucks for Perplexity Pro — but free search got scary good.
strength_hint: Cited sources and deep research mode for news-heavy workflows.
weakness_hint: Free tier + Google often enough for one-off questions.
verdict_hint: Pay if research is your job

hook: NotebookLM is free — here's the one reason people still skip it.
strength_hint: Upload PDFs and get cited answers from YOUR documents only.
weakness_hint: Weak for live web; best when you already have source material.

topic: CapCut AI features — free tier traps
hook: CapCut AI is bundled free — until you need export without a watermark.
strength_hint: Auto captions, AI cuts, and templates inside a free editor.
weakness_hint: Watermarks and export limits push you to Pro fast.

topic: ElevenLabs voice for Shorts — credit burn check
hook: ElevenLabs voice clones sound human — until you check the price meter.
strength_hint: Best-in-class voice clone quality for narration-heavy Shorts.
weakness_hint: Character credits vanish fast on daily uploads.

topic: HeyGen vs InVideo for AI avatar Shorts
hook: HeyGen's AI avatars look real — InVideo does Shorts for half the burn.
strength_hint: Polished talking-head avatars with lip sync.
weakness_hint: Higher credit cost than InVideo for daily Shorts volume.
verdict_hint: Skip if InVideo is your stack

hook: Midjourney still wins on art — but the subscription stack adds up fast.
strength_hint: Still top-tier aesthetic for stylized stills and concept art.
weakness_hint: $10–30/mo plus Discord friction; free alternatives caught up for drafts.

topic: Notion AI add-on — workspace tax check
hook: Notion AI sits inside your notes — but the add-on price adds up.
strength_hint: Summarize and rewrite inside docs you already live in.
weakness_hint: Per-seat add-on on top of Notion — ChatGPT sidebar is cheaper.
verdict_hint: Skip unless you live in Notion

hook: Descript edits podcasts like magic — overkill if you only make Shorts.
strength_hint: Text-based audio/video edit — delete words from transcript.
weakness_hint: Heavy subscription for a 30-second vertical workflow.
verdict_hint: Pay if you edit long-form talk

topic: Runway AI video clips — honest cost check
hook: Runway looks amazing — but the credit burn adds up fast.
strength_hint: Gen-3 video clips with cinematic motion control.
weakness_hint: Credits per second make daily Shorts budgets impossible.

topic: Opus Clip — auto Shorts from long video
hook: Opus Clip chops long videos into Shorts — if the AI picks wrong, you're sunk.
strength_hint: Auto-finds viral moments in long podcasts and webinars.
weakness_hint: Bad clip selection means more fix-up time than manual cuts.
verdict_hint: Pay if you have long videos to chop
